title: Face
description:
Face: A triangular or quadrilateral shape forming the basis of a polygon Mesh. Defined by corner vertices referencing indices of a Point list. See BH.oM.Geometry.Mesh object for usage.
A value of -1 for the fourth vertex D indicates the Face is triangular.

A.description: Index of first corner in Point list.

B.description: Index of second corner in Point list.

C.description: Index of third corner in Point list.

D.description: Index of fourth corner in Point list. Set to -1 for three-sided Face.

_t.description: Optional Type descriminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
